info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing e-commerce operations including products, orders, and customers.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management such as adding, updating, and retrieving products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Operations for processing customer orders including creating, updating, and tracking orders.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Customer management including registration, profile updates, and retrieval of customer information.

get.summary: Retrieve the current contents of a user's shopping cart
get.description: Fetches the shopping cart details for the specified userId, including all items currently added to the cart and their quantities. Returns an overview of the cart so the client can display or process the user's selected products.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart

400.description: Bad request due to invalid userId or malformed parameters

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or missing.

details.issue: The userId format is incorrect or empty

500.description: Internal server error processing the request

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified product item to the shopping cart of the given userId. The request body must include the details of the cart item such as product identifier and quantity. Returns the updated cart after addition.

requestBody.description: The cart item to add including product ID and quantity

productId.description: Unique identifier of the product to add

quantity.description: Number of units of the product to add

200.description: Item successfully added to the cart, updated cart returned

400.description: Invalid input data for the cart item or malformed request

example.message: The cart item data is invalid or missing required fields.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

500.description: Internal server error while adding item to cart

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the specified user
post.description: Creates a new order for the user identified by userId using the current shopping cart or order details. Returns the order confirmation and summary including order id and status.

200.description: Order successfully placed and confirmation details returned

400.description: Bad request due to invalid order placement data or userId

example.message: The order placement request contains invalid or missing information.

404.description: No cart or related resources found for the specified user

example.message: No active shopping cart found for the specified user.

details.issue: No cart exists for this userId

500.description: Internal server error during order placement

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve order details by order ID
get.description: Fetch detailed information about a specific order using its unique identifier. Returns order data including items, status, and customer details if found.

400.description: Invalid orderId supplied or malformed request.

example.message: The orderId provided is invalid or malformed.

details.issue: Must be a valid order identifier in correct format

example.message: No order found matching the provided orderId.

details.issue: Order does not exist in database

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a payment process by submitting payment details including amount, method, and payer information. Returns payment initiation status and transaction identifiers.

200.description: Payment initiated successfully, transaction details returned.

example.message: One or more payment request fields are invalid or missing.

details.issue: Must be a valid credit card number

402.description: Payment required or failed due to insufficient funds.

example.message: Payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds or declined card.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive and process payment provider webhook notifications
post.description: Handle incoming webhook events from payment providers to update payment statuses automatically. Processes event payload and returns acknowledgement.

requestBody.description: Webhook payload sent by the payment provider.

example.message: The webhook payload is missing required fields or contains invalid data.

402.description: Payment status update failed due to authorization issues.

example.message: Failed to authorize payment status update from webhook.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product in the product catalog with details provided. Expects a product request object with all required product information. Returns the created product details upon success.

requestBody.description: The product information to add to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

example.message: Product name must not be empty and price must be positive
A product with the given SKU already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieves the current shipping tracking information for the specified order identified by orderId.

404.description: Order not found or tracking information unavailable

example.message: No tracking information found for the given orderId

details.issue: Order with this ID does not exist

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided user details. Requires a user request object containing necessary user information like username, email, and password. Returns user details upon successful registration.

requestBody.description: The user information to register a new account

example.message: Email format is invalid and password is too weak

details.issue: Password must be at least 8 characters and include numbers and symbols

example.message: A user with this email or username already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code for the item's price, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to the item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the item after discount.

price.description: Original price of the item before discount.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the cart.

currency.description: Currency code used for all amounts in the cart.

items.description: List of items currently present in the cart.

totalAmount.description: Sum of original prices for all items before discount.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the entire cart.

updatedAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the cart was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who owns the cart.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this order item.

finalPrice.description: Final payable price for this item after discount.

price.description: Original price of the product before discount.

quantity.description: Quantity of this item in the order.

createdAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the order was created.

currency.description: Currency code used for all monetary values in the order.

items.description: List of items included in this order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable after discounts on the order.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

status.description: Current fulfillment status of the order.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for all items before any discount.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount amount applied to the order.

updatedAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the order was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

amount.description: Amount to be paid in the transaction.

currency.description: Currency code for the payment amount.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order related to this payment.

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway to process this payment.

paymentMethod.description: Method of payment selected by the user.

createdAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the payment was created.

currency.description: Currency code used for the payment.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order associated with this payment.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for this payment transaction.

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction.

transactionId.description: Gateway transaction identifier for the payment.

gatewayResponse.description: Raw response or message from the payment gateway.

paymentId.description: Identifier for the payment involved in the webhook.

status.description: Status update provided by the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier assigned by the payment gateway.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for sale.

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price.

rating.description: Average user rating of the product.

stock.description: Number of items available in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: Date when the product was created or added

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

stock.description: Number of items available in stock

updatedAt.description: Date when the product details were last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling delivery

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking status was last updated

orderId.description: Identifier of the order being tracked

active.description: Whether the user account is active

userType.description: Type or role of the user

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

createdAt.description: Date when the user account was created

updatedAt.description: Date when the user details were last updated

userType.description: Role or type of the user

details.description: Array of error details specifying issues

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field

error.description: Short description of the server error

message.description: Detailed error message from the server

status.description: HTTP status code representing server error
